race.description: Glen Innes Services Club/Inverell Mdn Hcp
race.comment: LYON (7) finally comes up with a decent gate and drops in trip. Went back from the wide gate and never got into the contest when twelfth over 1600m at Scone. Best figures measure up nicely and expected to go close. SIDE QUEST (12) just under a month between runs when she raced on the pace for a most improved second over 1200m at this track. Drops further in weight with the 4kg claim and set to peak. Top-three player. LEOVANNI (4) finds an easier race today after she turned in an eye-catching performance when second over 1300m at Scone. Likely to go back from the wide gate and launch late. SCATHINGLY (11) improving gelding who doesn't get the same map favours today after finishing third over 1000m at this track. Stays in the calculations.
